title: Assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§274. Assistant district attorneys

           The offices of first and second assistant district attorneys for the Twelfth Judicial District are created.

           Added by Acts 1967, No. 5, §1; Acts 1967, No. 38, §1. Amended by Acts 1973, No. 118, §5.
doc_text:
§274.  Assistant district attorneys
The offices of first and second assistant district attorneys for the
Twelfth Judicial District are created.
Added by Acts 1967, No. 5, §1; Acts 1967, No. 38, §1.  Amended by
Acts 1973, No. 118, §5.
